videos.title: EP 10 | What Happens After You Leave the Lie | By Semitic Jew
videos.description:
Leaving the lie is not the finish line. It is the beginning of separation, rebuilding, discipline, and obedience.

In EP 10, we move beyond exposing European frameworks and deal with what happens after the lie collapses. Some of us have left white Jesus, European religion, political cages, false holidays, and inherited systems behind — but many of us still do not know how to live without them.

This episode deals with the hard question:

After you leave the lie, can you actually live in truth?

We cover:

The shock after leaving the lie
Why separation has a cost
Rebuilding identity after European frameworks collapse
and more... 

This episode is not just about rejecting the lie. It is about building a disciplined life after the lie is gone.

videos.title: We need our own educational institutions ‼️ build with me.
Bible Study | Genesis 1:1–3 | By Semitic Jew
videos.description:
This Bible study examines Genesis 1:1–3 as the foundation for understanding creation, divine order, Scripture, and restoration.

The study begins with 2 Timothy 3:16–17, Matthew 19, and Matthew 22 to establish why all Scripture must be studied carefully and why Christ Himself pointed back to Genesis when addressing doctrine, law, and order.

This study covers:

- Genesis 1:1–3
- All Scripture as inspired by God
- Christ’s appeal to “the beginning”
- The Scriptures and the power of God
and more ... 

This lesson focuses on reading the text according to Scripture, not religious tradition, racial propaganda, or philosophical speculation.

Scripture. Logic. Truth.

Shalom.
